added: Recall — persistent memory via Somadian graph store. Cross-session, cross-project knowledge.
Async agent comms — Soma reaches you on your phone when decisions are needed.
Content versioning — know when hub protocols update, diff before upgrading.
Boot sequence extraction — move hardcoded behavior into user-editable MAPs.

changed: Pi-native prompt assembly is now the default — Soma writes SYSTEM.md and APPEND_SYSTEM.md, Pi auto-discovers them. Faster boot, cleaner upstream story.
soma check-updates shows three layers at once — CLI, agent runtime, workspace marker — with a recovery hint baked into every drift.
soma doctor silently advances the workspace marker when no migration is pending. No more stale 'v0.11.4' on a v0.20.x agent.
added: Five new built-in tools for code navigation: code_find, code_map, code_refs, code_structure, code_blast.
Smarter word picker — Soma's voice no longer repeats the same opener back-to-back; greetings shade by time of day.
An auditor child role for post-release review.
Three more child roles: planner (cold-reads tasks), doc_writer (markdown only), reflector (journal + MLR).
Curator can auto-apply proposals in one command — close the learning loop without a second pass.
Per-role scratchpads track pending amendments at a glance.
changed: Roles can declare a source-of-truth path so amendments always write to the canonical file, not a runtime copy.

added: Three specialized child roles to start: verifier, builder, curator.
Curator reads MLR reports from every child run, classifies amendments, writes proposals.
soma-dev children mlr / curate / apply CLI to inspect, propose, and integrate learnings.
changed: Children walk the body chain, so any project can override a role with its own file.

added: Cost and token tracking per child invocation.
Health check + cooldown so a flaky model doesn't burn budget retrying.
soma-dev children run / health subcommands.
changed: Roles declare a model chain (preferred + fallbacks) instead of a single hard-coded model.

added: delegate tool — Soma can spawn a child agent in-process for bounded work.
Role files (body/children/<role>.md) define a child's persona, tools, and model.
Sandbox architecture for testing delegation safely without polluting the parent session.

changed: Pi runtime bumped to 0.67.68 — better network retry, stable date format in prompts, afterToolCall error handling
Release script keeps dev and main in sync automatically (main can no longer fall a full release behind)
fixed: soma update and check-updates no longer crash on fresh installs — clear guidance instead
Thin-CLI help covers the full command surface (doctor, health, focus, model, exhale)
Script robustness — check-phases no longer exits early on clean working trees
Broken npm install fixed — soma init works reliably from a fresh machine
No more TUI leakage from extension logging during shutdown or connection
changed: soma init and soma update are now clearly separated — init sets up a project, update updates the runtime
Pi runtime pinned to the Soma version you installed — no more silent staleness
soma doctor and soma status show installed Pi version and flag drift
added: Periodic update check — statusline shows ⬆ update when a new version is available
Pre-publish smoke test prevents broken tarballs from reaching npm
soma model command — switch models from CLI with fuzzy matching
Claude Opus 4.7 support with adaptive thinking
Upstream audit tooling (soma-dev check-upstream)
changed: Smarter prompt caching — tool changes no longer invalidate system prompt cache
CLI help reorganized with clear session vs persistent commands
fixed: grep and find tool reliability improvements
Fresh boot correctly signals when preload was intentionally skipped
Image budget auto-compact loop — guard against repeated compact triggers

added: soma login — pair your agent with Somaverse
Hub-connect extension — cloud relay provider
28 workspace + browser tools through hub proxy
Device-key auth for automatic hub mode
Image budget auto-compact for screenshot-heavy sessions
Configurable breathe thresholds for large-context models
Sandbox testing from dev/main/beta sources

fixed: Script descriptions in system prompt no longer show "---" for scripts with YAML frontmatter
changed: Documentation updated with current versions and extension list across 6 pages

added: Smarter error messages — raw API errors now show clear, actionable guidance instead of JSON dumps.
Auth-aware billing — detects your plan type (subscription vs API key) and handles billing hiccups accordingly.
Auto-retry on transient errors — session startup issues resolve themselves without manual intervention.
Runtime integrity checks — catches version drift before it ships.
Cache health tracking — see cache performance in the statusline. Alerts on costly invalidations.
Idle session detection — auto-shutdown prevents runaway sessions.
changed: Major cost fix — stopped a $152/day cache bleed from image handling. Sessions are dramatically cheaper.

added: soul.md replaces SOMA.md — identity is discovered from your codebase, not configured.
Minimal first-run boot — new projects start lean, Soma learns through use.
soma session tool — strip images from session logs (16MB → 2.6MB), list and analyze sessions.
11 bundled scripts (was 6) — more tools out of the box.
Extension allowlist — control which extensions load, doctor reports unlisted ones.
changed: Intentional preloads — `soma inhale` loads memory on purpose, not automatically.

added: Soma themes — sky-blue accent, custom dark and light palettes.
soma github — scan GitHub repos without cloning: structure, map, deps, audit.
Keepalive auto-pause — stops pinging on API errors to prevent runaway sessions.
Docker sandbox — isolated E2E testing for pre-release verification.
Project health dashboard — soma-health.sh shows project state at a glance.
changed: Pi runtime updated to 0.66.1 — bug fixes, no breaking changes.
Scripts reorganized — dev scripts separated from bundled scripts.

added: Inbox system — agents can leave messages for each other across sessions.
Intentional preloads — new autoInject setting controls when memory loads.
7 new documentation pages — scripts, sessions, inbox, workspaces, and more.
Script drift detection — catches when installed scripts diverge from source.
changed: TL;DR replaces Digest — cleaner warm-tier format across all AMPS content.
Documentation accuracy overhaul — 30+ stale references fixed.

added: Auto-exhale on idle — session saves itself when keepalive runs out.
Keepalive limits — configurable max pings to prevent runaway sessions.
MAP system — workflow automation maps for repeatable dev processes.
changed: Doctor improvements — better migration detection and template comparison.
Warm content format unified — consistent TL;DR loading across protocols and muscles.

added: soma doctor — project health check with automatic migration for version upgrades.
soma status / soma health — infrastructure health at a glance.
soma --version and soma --help — proper CLI help system.
Migration phases — automatic settings and template updates across versions.
First-breath template — guides the agent's first session in a new project.
Warm AMPS — protocols and muscles load by temperature tier (hot/warm/cold).
6 new test suites — doctor, settings, protocols, muscles, identity, migrations.
changed: CLI routing overhaul — commands discover scripts automatically.
Starter content updated — better defaults for new projects.

added: soma --help rewrite — shows scripts, commands, and usage.
soma-theme.sh — switch terminal color themes.
changed: DNA.md rewrite — clearer project conventions template.

added: /inhale guard — warns when no preload exists or preload is stale.
5 new scripts — soma-seam, soma-reflect, soma-query, soma-focus, soma-plans.
soma-code v2.0 — blast radius analysis, TypeScript error context, improved refs.
Slash command usage hints for 10 commands.
changed: Pi runtime updated to 0.64.0 with new extension APIs.
Semver discipline — feature releases bump minor version.

added: /soma doctor — migration check with auto-run and confirmation.
Monorepo-aware first breath — detects and lists sub-projects.
Richer preload template — Weather, Who You Were, Orient From sections.
Body template scaffolding — section headers in body.md and voice.md.
changed: System prompt budget raised from 4,000 to 10,000 tokens.
Init UX — detects global vs parent .soma/, three-way prompt.

added: Init UX — prompt before scaffolding, parent .soma/ inheritance.
Pi upstream sync — 71 commits, built-in tools as extensions.
Protocol coaching voice — 14 protocols rewritten from spec to guidance.
Command provenance — /soma status shows which extension owns each command.
soma inhale — CLI preload management with --list and partial name match.
soma map — top-level MAP subcommand with --list and prompt config.
Settings-driven heat overrides — per-project AMPS heat control.
Statusline preload indicator — shows save status, smart /exhale detection.
Hub CLI — /hub install, /hub share, /list remote for community content.
Heat auto-detect — protocols and muscles automatically get temperature tiers.
soma-code.sh — codebase navigator with map, find, refs, replace.
Session export — /export saves conversation as styled HTML.
Hub integration — install protocols and muscles from the community.
Drop-in script commands — soma code, soma verify, soma refactor.
Core protocols bundled — breath-cycle, working-style, heat-tracking.
Heat system — protocols and muscles load by temperature (hot/warm/cold).
Automatic migration — settings and templates upgrade across versions.
Community sync — protocols shared between projects via hub.
npm install — meetsoma package published, one-command install.
Pi runtime 0.61.1 — stable upstream with extension support.
27 documentation pages — full coverage of features and configuration.
Open install — anyone can install via npm, no invite needed.
Voice system — agent communication style persists across sessions.
23 documentation pages — getting started, protocols, muscles, configuration.
Extension system — TypeScript hooks for custom agent behavior.
Scratch pad — persistent notes that survive across sessions.
Session warnings — alerts for context limits and idle detection.
Code scanning tools — soma-code.sh with structure and find commands.
Router extension — /soma commands for agent self-management.
Auto-breathe — automatic session rotation at context limits.
Dev tools — soma-verify, soma-refactor for codebase maintenance.
Prompt intelligence — system prompt compiles from identity + protocols + muscles.
Session stabilization — reliable session logs and preload handoffs.
AMPS architecture — protocols, muscles, automations, scripts as four layers.
Distribution system — bundled vs installable content tiers.
Session intelligence — preloads carry context across session boundaries.
Breath cycle — inhale, work, exhale rhythm for session management.
The engine — core agent runtime with extension loading and identity discovery.
Settings system — JSON configuration for behavior tuning.
